mnemonics.title: Aggregate Functions
mnemonics.content: CSSM - Count Sum AVG Max Min. Remember: 'Clever Students Study More' for counting, summing, averaging, maximum, minimum.

mnemonics.title: WHERE vs HAVING
mnemonics.content: WGH - Where Goes First, Having Comes Later. WHERE filters before grouping, HAVING filters after.

mnemonics.title: GROUP BY Order
mnemonics.content: SFA - Select From Where Group By Having Order By. Remember: 'She Finds Where Groups Have Order'

acronyms.expansion: Groups rows with same values for aggregate calculations
acronyms.usage: Used with aggregate functions to create summary reports
Used to filter groups based on aggregate conditions
